case_title: GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL CORPORATION VS TROTT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $939.30 FILED BY GENERAL ELECTRIC CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TROTT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
